Package com.mentor.chs.plugin.wiringdesigngenerator

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    IXDiagramPartition
    A functionally partitioned diagram is a diagram generated by CAVAI for the wiring information in an Integrator design applicable to a functional diagram in the functional designs associated with the Integrator design.
    A diagram partition is a further partitioning of a functionally partitioned diagram.
    This class determines the content of the diagram partition.
    IXDiagramPartitionConfigurer
    This class will be used by system to allow users to configure a partitioner plugin before diagram generation.
    IXDiagramPartitioner
    This class is used by CAVAI during diagram generation to determine the diagarm partitions for each functional diagram.
    IXDiagramPartitionerPlugin
    This plugin will be used by CAVAI to determine the creation of partition diagrams for a functional diagram

    Usage pattern 1 : A plugin with UI, that creates/modifies settings

    1.
